steps.title: Identify what readers struggle with
steps.content: The key signal is “many readers have a difficult time even identifying the poems' subjects.” This directly tells us what's hard about the poetry — understanding its meaning.

steps.title: Match comprehension to the choices
steps.content:
”Comprehend” means “to understand,” and that's exactly what the passage describes as difficult — readers struggle to grasp the meaning of dense, experimental poetry with obscure references.

The other three don't fit: “dislike” addresses preference (never mentioned), “interrupt” has no logical connection, and “overlook” means to ignore (opposite of the comprehension challenge).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
